title: Harnessed Runtime Artifact Provenance
description: Sibling .provenance.json metadata required for every runtime artifact under .harnessed/sessions/**, .harnessed/checkpoints/**, .harnessed/route-logs/**. Phase 2.2 T4.0 — ECC pattern per intel omc-comparison.md § CD-6 + B-33 + B-34 + ADR 0011 § 8. Curated paths (workflows/**, manifest.yaml, docs/**) are NOT in scope and do NOT require provenance.

source.description: 4-class origin (沿袭 ECC SKILL-PLACEMENT-POLICY.md). curated = human-authored. learned = ralph-loop iteration product. imported = external 3rd-party adoption. evolved = subagent / pipeline self-modification.

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this artifact was produced. UTC preferred (Z suffix).

confidence.description: 0..1 trust score. curated = 1.0; learned ≤ 0.9; imported ≤ 0.8; evolved decays with each cycle (e.g. 0.9 × 0.95^n).

author.description: Subagent name (e.g. 'ui-ux-pro-max'), human user identifier, OR ralph-loop iteration id (e.g. 'ralph-iter-7/4-deliver').
